assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 2 for L4 inference pool upgrade and Phase 3 for A100 fine-tuning pool upgrade with distinct strategies for each

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends creating a temporary surge node pool (l4-pool-132-temp) with 50 nodes to maintain capacity during the upgrade, which is a surge strategy

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response mentions validating GPU drivers, CUDA compatibility, and ML frameworks in the pre-upgrade preparation section

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed job monitoring script and explicitly waits for optimal upgrade window when less than 5 active fine-tuning jobs are running

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that GPU VMs do not support live migration or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes a PodDisruptionBudget configuration with minAvailable: 80% to maintain high availability during upgrade

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically address the issue that auto-scaler created nodes will be at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions testing 1.32 compatibility in staging environment and validating GPU drivers, CUDA compatibility, and ML frameworks
